name: Indian Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt into the tomatoes and let sit for 3 hours.
2. Pour water over the tomatoes, then drain well in a large kettle (8-quart size).
3. Combine all vegetables with vinegar; boil for 3 minutes.
4. Add flour, dry mustard, turmeric, celery seed, and mustard seed to make a thin paste.
5. Mix with enough vinegar to incorporate all ingredients.
6. Stir in hot water, additional vinegar, and sugar.
7. Add the mixture to the first set of ingredients.
8. Cook until thick, stirring frequently.
9. Seal while hot in pint-sized sterile jars using ball lids or screw-top jars.
